final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo for "O Conselho Star" — a group of women entrepreneurs and businesswomen who support each other in business growth, leadership, mentoring, and strategy.

风格/媒介: logo design, elegant and sophisticated, feminine yet authoritative
构图: clean, balanced composition suitable for a brand identity; symbol or emblem that conveys unity, intelligence, and collective strength
主体: logo for "O Conselho Star" — grupo de mulheres inteligentes
场景/背景: transparent or white background
光线/氛围: refined, empowering, prestigious
色彩方案: off-white and gold only
材质/纹理: smooth, flat or subtle metallic gold accents
文字(原样): O Conselho Star
约束: must work as a standalone logo mark; off-white and gold palette strictly
避免: busy backgrounds, photographic elements, gradients unrelated to gold, bright or saturated colors
